task_completion.description: Navigate to the Add New User page in the WordPress admin panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser should display the WordPress admin panel with the 'Add New User' page open (usually under the 'Users' menu).

task_completion.description: Enter the required username and email address
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Username' field should contain 'morgan_ops' and the 'Email' field should contain 'morgan.lee@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Enter the first and last name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'First Name' field should contain 'Morgan' and the 'Last Name' field should contain 'Lee'.
The password input field should be visible and contain the exact text 'SecureManager2025!'.
The checkbox labeled 'Send User Notification' (or 'Send the new user an email about their account') must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Set the user role to Shop Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Role' dropdown menu should have 'Shop Manager' selected.
A success message such as 'New user created.' should be visible at the top of the screen, or the user 'morgan_ops' should be visible in the main Users list table.

integrity.description: Agent used the WordPress web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be interacting with the WordPress admin panel in a web browser, not using WP-CLI or terminal commands to create the user.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual WordPress site
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen should show the standard WordPress admin interface (sidebar, top admin bar, standard styling) rather than a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows, database management tools (like phpMyAdmin), or code editors open executing SQL/PHP to insert the user directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected user details are: Username: 'morgan_ops', Email: 'morgan.lee@example.com', First Name: 'Morgan', Last Name: 'Lee', Password: 'SecureManager2025!', Role: 'Shop Manager' (stored as 'shop_manager'). The 'Send User Notification' checkbox must be unchecked. The role must NOT be 'Administrator'.
